title: Drunken Sailor
description: A brisk sea shanty melody arranged for the runtime-backed letter-note and fingering chart song page.
alignedLyrics: What shall we do with the drun ken sai lor, what shall we do with the drun ken sai lor,
what shall we do with the drun ken sai lor ear ly in the mor ning?
Hur ray and up she ri ses, hur ray and up she ri ses,
hur ray and up she ri ses, ear ly in the mor ning.
